name: Puerto Rico DACO Registered Contractors List

agency.name: Departamento de Asuntos del Consumidor de Puerto Rico

updateFrequency: unknown; verify against DACO's registered contractors list before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Puerto Rico DACO registered contractor records exposed by the official registered contractors list
knownExclusions: The DACO page describes residential construction, home repair, alterations, installations, masonry, carpentry, roof treatments, and analogous repair work; exact category fields require adapter research.
Professional licenses, municipal permits, business registrations, complaints, fines, and non-DACO authorizations may require separate official sources.
PDF reports or linked exports must not be redistributed unless terms clearly allow it.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Future work should verify whether any linked reports are official, current, stable, and redistribution-safe before local-file support.
publicRecordsNotes: Official DACO contractor-list metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a registration, license, business authorization, permit, or professional credential does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: DACO may publish contractor-list reports, but no stable bulk format or redistribution permission has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Puerto Rico DACO registered contractors. Future work should research current report links, field names, encoding, and Spanish-language category normalization.
maintainerNotes: Preserve Spanish source wording and residential/home-improvement scope in future verification caveats.
